text: A photograph showing the exterior of a dilapidated building complex under a bright blue sky. On the left, a structure with a corrugated metal roof and a blue-painted entranceway is visible. A person wearing a blue shirt stands near the entrance. To the right, a section of the building is heavily damaged, with exposed wooden beams, debris, and a collapsed roof structure. A motorcycle is partially visible in the foreground on the right.
